G3-03.notes: Applied with modification: removed the prescriptive 'never contribute more than your valuation' line. Kept only the factual warning that net utility is NEGATIVE if over-contributing.

G3-04.notes: Applied with dynamic computation: coverage = round(total_budget / total_cost * 100), correct for all sigma values.

G3-05.notes: Applied with revised wording: (1) refund framed as opportunity cost within a round, (2) utility formula scoped to ALL funded projects including those funded entirely by others (free-rider benefit).
